text: Hello? Hello? Hello. Good afternoon. This is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits for up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Nevada State Relief Program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet? Yes, so I was asking if you've received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan?
